# cmake/CMakeLists.txt -- AUTO-GENERATED by `tur fetch`. Do not edit.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(SpiceDeps)

include(FetchContent)

# plutovg
FetchContent_Declare(plutovg
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/sammycage/plutovg
  GIT_TAG        v1.3.3
)
set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(PLUTOVG_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(plutovg)

# --- Generate spice-deps-manifest.json ---
set(_spice_manifest_path "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/spice-deps-manifest.json")
set(_spice_manifest "{\n")
set(_spice_first TRUE)

# manifest entry: plutovg
if(NOT _spice_first)
  string(APPEND _spice_manifest ",\n")
endif()
set(_spice_first FALSE)
FetchContent_GetProperties(plutovg)
if(EXISTS "${plutovg_SOURCE_DIR}/include")
  set(_spice_plutovg_inc "${plutovg_SOURCE_DIR}/include")
else()
  set(_spice_plutovg_inc "${plutovg_SOURCE_DIR}")
endif()
set(_spice_plutovg_bld "${plutovg_BINARY_DIR}")
string(APPEND _spice_manifest
  "  \"plutovg\": {\n"
  "    \"include_dirs\": [\"${_spice_plutovg_inc}\"],\n"
  "    \"link_dirs\":    [\"${_spice_plutovg_bld}\"],\n"
  "    \"link_libs\":    [\"plutovg\"]\n"
  "  }")

string(APPEND _spice_manifest "\n}\n")
file(WRITE "${_spice_manifest_path}" "${_spice_manifest}")
message(STATUS "spice: wrote cmake/spice-deps-manifest.json")
